{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (IV strategy) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (exclusion restriction), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or propose minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (conclusion contradicts itself).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (IV strategy) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (exclusion restriction), but does not walk the chain end-to-end or propose minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (conclusion contradicts itself).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
